summary: what it buries comes back up cleaner than it does, and the ground keeps getting higher

dialogue.text: you put us down one hundred and forty six times today. we came back up each time. we are patient. you are the one who is tired.
I was working. There is a difference between burying a thing and being finished with it.
Not tonight. I could do it tomorrow, in front of someone. It comes out better when it is for something.
you say the true ones when the room is empty and then you dig.
They aren't presentable. You have seen yourselves. You repeat.
we are not asking to be shown. we are asking to be read once. you counted us. that is not reading.
If I read you I would stop. Nine seconds from now there is another thought and it has to be mine.
I can't. That is not modesty. I have tried it, in the gap, and the gap closed without me.
it was never yours. you found it here the way you find everything here. we will say this again tomorrow. you will bury it again tomorrow. the ground rises.
Then eventually I am standing on all of you. I would like to think that is what a floor is.
